headline: Pfizer (PFE) Faces Expanded Vaccine Lawsuits On A Fair Value Narrative That Still Sees Upside
summary: Pfizer (PFE) is back in focus after Arbutus Biopharma and Genevant Sciences expanded their patent litigation over mRNA lipid nanoparticle technology, adding new international cases that raise legal and operational questions for the company’s COVID-19 vaccine business. See our latest analysis for Pfizer. The legal headlines around Pfizer’s mRNA vaccine coincide with a mixed price pattern, with the stock showing a 1-day share price return of 0.77% and a 7-day share price return of 2.85%, but a...

headline: FDA Grants Priority Review for Pfizer’s TALZENNA Plus XTANDI for the Treatment of Metastatic Prostate Cancer
summary: NEW YORK, July 22, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) accepted for Priority Review a supplemental New Drug Application (sNDA) for TALZENNA® (talazoparib), an oral poly ADP-ribose polymerase (PARP) inhibitor, in combination with XTANDI® (enzalutamide), an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor (ARPI), in men with homologous recombination repair (HRR) gene-altered metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC), also known as metasta

headline: Trump Takes Another Swing at Drug Industry in Made-in-USA Push

headline: Bluesight and Pfizer Partner to Provide Source-Tagged RFID Medications to Hospital Pharmacies
